If someone says another person lies, that means the other person's statements are false, but maybe we need to figure out the implications based on the chain of who says what. Then, Gwenn says that Jamey tells the truth. But we know from the first statement that Jamey lies. So if Jamey lies, then Gwenn's statement that Jamey tells the truth must be false. Therefore, Osvaldo is lying as well. So the answer would be that Osvaldo does not tell the truth; he is lying. Wait, but let me double-check to make sure I didn't make any mistakes.
